title: What is the actual groundwater withdrawal rate?
body: The PTI application references a 250 gpm peak draw but the SWPPP omits the sustained baseline figure. A public-records request to OEPA for the water-use permit file has not yet returned figures.

title: Generator count behind the 313 MW figure
body: Trade-secret redaction on the per-engine ekW prevents independent verification of the stated aggregate.

title: Missing lead:kind label — should be skipped
body: This issue has no lead:kind label so it must be dropped during sync.
